title: Croatian Risotto Gratin
description: A creamy risotto topped with a crispy gratin crust, inspired by Croatian cuisine. This dish is perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the risotto and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the beef stock, one ladle at a time, stirring continuously.
When the risotto is cooked, stir in the Croatian Smetana and Parmesan Cheese.
Transfer the risotto to a baking dish and top with a layer of grated cheese.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the risotto is baking, mix the fermented paprika with a little water to create a paste.
Brush the paste over the top of the gratin during the last 5 minutes of baking.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with parsley.
